title: Dispatcher: PR merge detection — auto-transition review task to done
description:
When a task reaches `review` status, `validateStageCompletion()` blocks advancement until `github_pull_request.state === 'merged'`. But nothing currently detects the merge and transitions the task. Marcus has to manually update the canonical file or the task stays blocked in review forever.

Fix: in `inspectActiveHookClaims()`, for tasks with `status === 'review'` and `github_pull_request.number` set, call `gh pr view <number> --repo <repo> --json state,mergedAt` and if `state === 'MERGED'`, update the task:
- Set `status: done`, `workflow_stage: done`
- Set `github_pull_request.state: merged`, `last_synced_at: now`
- Set `timestamps.completed_at: mergedAt`
- Write to both runtime state and canonical task file
- Send lifecycle notification

Scope: only check PRs for tasks that have been in review for > 5 minutes (avoid immediate re-check on dispatch). Use `runGh()` already available in the dispatcher.
